answer: Salesforce provides two distinct approaches to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for Commerce Cloud. The PWA Kit MCP Server (and the broader B2C Developer Tooling MCP) is a local, developer-focused tool designed to assist with storefront development, SCAPI exploration, and code generation within IDEs like Cursor [1][2][3]. Conversely, the B2C Commerce MCP Shopper Service is a fully hosted, enterprise-grade service aimed at the shopper experience, enabling AI agents to perform real-time cart operations, product searches, and checkout integrations via authenticated SLAS tokens [4][5]. Additionally, community-led MCP implementations exist for custom OCAPI/SCAPI integrations [6][7].
